rationale: The cited paper is a close conceptual/methodological match: it models dynamic paid-search spillover and carryover (generic→branded via latent awareness), while the citing paper explicitly models paid-search intermediaries (impressions, click-through rate) and advertising dynamics in its multi-equation system. Given this overlap and the citing paper’s stated extension of prior paid-search/multichannel work, this reference is plausibly foundational or mechanism-relevant rather than a mere background mention.
